subject: {rival} monitors {player}'s contract
body:
I've learned that {rival} is closely monitoring {player}'s contract situation. If we don't extend soon, they may try to capitalize.

Something to consider in our planning.

es.subject: {rival} sigue el contrato de {player}
es.body:
He sabido que {rival} está siguiendo de cerca la situación contractual de {player}. Si no renovamos pronto, podrían intentar aprovecharse.

Algo a considerar en nuestra planificación.
